summary_lines: The first grounded three-node proof now exists.
`adf-dev` reached the target lab with `target-preflight`, `target-heartbeat`, and a bounded shell command.
The PackFactory manifest-push edge was fixed by creating `.packfactory-remote` during remote payload swap.

handoff_summary: Three-node staging is now proven at the helper-slice level.
Local Pack Factory remained the canonical control plane.
The target lab stayed the runtime evidence source.
highest_risk_observation: The current proof is still a helper-level target slice, not yet a full bounded content checkpoint under the three-node split.

memory_tier.summary: Restart memory after the first grounded three-node ADF proof.

memory_validity.summary: High-confidence restart memory because the lean stage, target hop, and control-plane fix are all now preserved in canonical pack state.

summary_lines: Do not overstate this proof as a full content checkpoint yet.
Do not omit `.packfactory-remote` creation during remote payload swap.

recommended_next_action: Recommended next action: run one bounded real `adf-dev -> target` evidence slice under the same lean three-node split and pull back only checkpoint/evidence artifacts.
resolved_block_summary: The three-node model is now proven at the lean-stage and target-helper level, and the remote manifest push bug is fixed.
summary: The first grounded three-node ADF proof is now recorded: lean PackFactory stage, successful `adf-dev -> target` helper slice, and local PackFactory control-plane continuity.
